"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Summary
`ujson.dumps()` (or `ujson.dump()` or `ujson.encode()`) have a `reject_bytes=False` option. When set, they may accept malformed or truncated UTF-8 byte sequences, silently rewriting them into different Unicode characters instead of rejecting them. This leads to input validation bypass and data integrity issues.

### Details

The expected behavior is that for `x` being any bytes string, `x == ujson.loads(ujson.dumps(x, reject_bytes=False)).encode(errors="surrogatepass")` should always either be true or `ujson.dumps()` will throw an exception. In reality, some strings which should've been errors are silently rewritten as other strings:

* Invalid continuation bytes are replaced with valid ones: `b'\xcf\x13'` -> `b'\xcf\x93'`
* Unterminated sequence completes the sequence: `b'\xc3'` -> `b'\xc3\x80'`
* ... or leads to reading past the end of string: `b'\xf0\x90\x94'` -> `b"\xf0\x90\x94\x80inxcontrib'"`

### Impact

An application relying on reject_bytes=False for UTF-8 handling may experience:

- Data integrity issues
- Experience validation bypass if said validation occurs before serialisation

### Remediation

The missing/broken UTF-8 validation checks were added/fixed in https://github.com/ultrajson/ultrajson/commit/169eaf36b1116fece5034ee79a7a0ef3f6deedcf. We recommend upgrading to [UltraJSON 5.13.0](https://github.com/ultrajson/ultrajson/releases/tag/5.13.0).

### Workarounds

Decoding bytes to strings in Python before passing them to `ujson.dumps()` avoids this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00272, "percentile": 0.18959}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3j69-69wj-xqx2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3j69-69wj-xqx2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3j69-69wj-xqx2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54911"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-22T22:16:50Z", "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:47:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ultrajson/ultrajson/security/advisories/GHSA-3j69-69wj-xqx2", "https://github.com/ultrajson/ultrajson/commit/169eaf36b1116fece5034ee79a7a0ef3f6deedcf", "https://github.com/ultrajson/ultrajson/releases/tag/5.13.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54911", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/ujson/PYSEC-2026-2294.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3j69-69wj-xqx2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ultrajson/ultrajson/security-advisories/GHSA-3j69-69wj-xqx2", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ultrajson/ultrajson", "summary": "UltraJSON: Malformed/Truncated UTF-8 Accepted and Silently Rewritten in ujson.dumps()", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-18T17:28:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3j69-69wj-xqx2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.13.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ujson"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.12.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: UltraJSON: Malformed/Truncated UTF-8 Accepted and Silently Rewritten in ujson.dumps()
